plain_language_requirement: Document your Art. 6(3) assessment before placing the system on the market or putting it into service. The documentation must explain why each exception condition is met and be made available to national competent authorities on request. There is no proactive notification duty.
triggered_when: Art. 6(3) exception applies to an Annex III system (exception_applies = true)

plain_language_requirement: Register the system in the EU database before placing it on the market. Even though the system is not classified as high-risk due to the Art. 6(3) exception, registration under Art. 49(2) is still required.
triggered_when: Art. 6(3) exception applies to an Annex III system (exception_applies = true)
